Localization.Description: SafeMobile Monitor is uninstalled from a device

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: SafeMobile Monitor is uninstalled from device {datafield3} (SN: {datafield4}, IMEI: {datafield1}, UDID: {datafield2}, OS: {datafield6} {datafield5}) of user {subject.account.fullname} on host {event_src.host}
